hero.title: The written doorway into the work.
hero.description: Books are not side products here. They are one of the clearest ways to carry the doctrine home, revisit it slowly, and let the work deepen in private.

books.title: The Cipher of Healing
books.description: The primary written expression of the doctrine for readers who want the worldview, language, and architecture of the work in book form.
books.bestFor: Readers who want the full framework before joining a live experience.

books.title: The Companion Journal
books.description: A guided writing companion for turning insight into repeatable reflection, tracking, and daily restoration practice.
books.bestFor: People who need a private, disciplined way to keep the work alive between sessions.

books.title: The Resilience Bundle
books.description: A tactile bundle of tools designed to make care embodied, visible, and repeatable in ordinary life.
books.bestFor: People ready to translate insight into a lived ritual of restoration.

channelStrategy: Keep books discoverable on major marketplaces while also presenting them on the owned platform as part of a larger restoration journey with bundles, journals, and guided next steps.
